extDescription.message: Reads the Terms of Service so you don't have to. Shows a risk score before you click 'I Agree'.

stateIdle.message: No Terms of Service detected on this page.
stateIdle.description: Side panel when nothing was analyzed

errorNoDeviceAI.message: On-device AI is not available on this device. Score based on database only.
errorNoDeviceAI.description: Fallback message when Chrome AI unavailable

sectionTopThree.description: Heading above the top-3 risks bullet list

sectionFlags.description: Heading above the full flag list

btnShowInDocument.description: Button that highlights the quote in the original ToS

labelEvidence.description: Label before a verbatim quote in a flag card

labelSourceDB.description: Source badge when result comes from static DB

labelSourceAI.description: Source badge when result comes from Chrome built-in AI

disclaimerBody.message: Automated pattern detection — not legal advice. Each flag is backed by language found in the publicly available document.

donationTitle.message: Assent is free and made by one developer

donationBody.message: No ads. No tracking. No selling your data. If Assent helped you avoid a bad ToS, consider buying me a coffee — it keeps the project alive.

donationBtnCustom.description: Secondary donate button — user picks amount
